items.original_title: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
items.title_en: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
items.summary_en: They're rolling up their sleeves again, seemingly out of fear of missing AI's defining moment and, presumably, the irresistible allure of making even more money -- potentially a lot more.
items.title_zh: 成功的科技赢家为何再次全力以赴投入AI
items.summary_zh: 科技行业的赢家们再次积极投入AI，更是为了赢得市场份额和经济利益。

items.original_title: Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
items.title_en: Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
items.summary_en: Of all the debates raging about the potential downsides of AI, there is one worry causing the most hand-wringing among AI enthusiasts in Silicon Valley — that the giant AI labs that sell proprietary models are somehow acting like Trojan horses.
items.title_zh: 纳德拉对AI实验室的警告引发业内关注
items.summary_zh: 微软CEO纳德拉对AI实验室提出了警告，称其可能暗藏风险。

items.original_title: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want to be “everything for everyone”
items.title_en: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want to be “everything for everyone”
items.summary_en: Uber Chief Product Officer Sachin Kansal walks TechCrunch through the company's financial-services ambitions, its increasingly complicated relationship with Waymo, its new AV Labs data operation, and how AI is starting to show up in ways riders and drivers will actually notice.
items.title_zh: Uber产品负责人谈酒店、机器人出租车及未来愿景
items.summary_zh: Uber的产品负责人谈及公司对新兴技术的响应及财务野心。

items.original_title: Video-generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
items.title_en: Video-generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
items.summary_en: With the cash, the company aims to expand its world model offering and reach customers across geographies.
items.title_zh: 视频生成初创公司PixVerse融资439M，估值突破20亿
items.summary_zh: 视频生成初创公司PixVerse融资4.39亿美元，估值超过20亿美元。

items.original_title: NVIDIA Ising Decoding Cuts Color Code Logical Error Rates by Over 300X
items.title_en: NVIDIA Ising Decoding Cuts Color Code Logical Error Rates by Over 300X
items.summary_en: Useful quantum computers will require fault tolerant logical operations. Researchers are actively exploring many different quantum error correction (QEC) codes...
items.title_zh: NVIDIA的新量子解码方法显著降低逻辑错误率
items.summary_zh: NVIDIA在量子计算领域的最新成果，降低了逻辑误差率，有助于量子计算机的实用化。

items.summary_en: Anti-AI-slop agent skill: makes text read written and UI look made, not generated. Deterministic scanners + severity-tiered tell catalogs. GitHub: 12 stars, 1 forks.
items.title_zh: 抗AI生成内容的技能项目推出
items.summary_zh: 一个新的技能项目基于AI，旨在优化用户界面内容以减少AI生成痕迹。

items.original_title: Turing Award winner Rich Sutton founds Oak Lab to build AI agents that learn on their own
items.title_en: Turing Award winner Rich Sutton founds Oak Lab to build AI agents that learn on their own
items.summary_en: Richard Sutton, 2024 Turing Award winner and co-founder of modern reinforcement learning, has launched a new startup called Oak Lab in Toronto. He calls current deep learning methods "weak and inefficient" and wants to build AI agents that learn continuously from their environment. The article Turing Award winner Rich…
items.title_zh: 图灵奖得主理查德·萨顿创办Oak Lab，致力于自主学习AI代理
items.summary_zh: 图灵奖得主理查德·萨顿创建新公司Oak Lab，目标是构建自动学习的AI代理。
